description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-examples/kubernetes-deploy Docker image with stages build, test, doc, review, staging, canary, production, and cleanup. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `command build`. Add test jobs in the test stage—coveralls-integration-test, cucumber-mysql-acceptance-test, cucumber-postgres-acceptance-test, rspec-mysql-unit-test, rspec-postgres-unit-test, rubocop-static-analysis-test, sast, simplecov-code-coverage, and tanuki-docs—each executing `exit 0`. Add a review job in the review stage that runs `command deploy`, creates a dynamic review environment named `review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME` with URL `http://$CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG-$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG.$KUBE_DOMAIN`, and defines an on_stop `stop_review`; also add a stop_review cleanup job that runs `command destroy` manually, stops the review environment, and runs only on branches except master. Add staging, blue, green, and canary jobs in their respective stages that run `command deploy` (or `command canary` for canary), are limited to the master branch, are manual, and deploy to production environments `prodblue` or `prodgreen` with URLs `http://$CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG-prod-blue.$KUBE_DOMAIN` or `http://$CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG-prod-green.$KUBE_DOMAIN`.
